query-spec-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser saved-query Spec v1
query-spec-v1.description: The user-authored query.spec document. Saved-query envelope fields are intentionally outside this schema.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional authoring note shown with the saved query.

favorite.title: Favorite
favorite.description: Whether the query is included in favorite-driven surfaces.

view.title: Preferred result view
view.description: The result representation restored when the saved query opens.

resultColumnIndex.title: Result column index
resultColumnIndex.description: Zero-based index of a ClickHouse result column.

deltaPresentation.title: Delta presentation
deltaPresentation.description: Display metadata for a runtime KPI delta value.

displayName.title: Delta label
displayName.description: Optional visible label for the delta.

unit.title: Delta unit
unit.description: Display-only suffix appended to the delta.

decimals.title: Delta decimal places
decimals.description: Requested display rounding for the delta.

positiveIsGood.title: Positive is good
positiveIsGood.description: Whether a positive runtime delta has good semantics.

show.title: Show delta
show.description: Whether a present runtime delta is rendered.

fieldConfigValue.title: Field presentation metadata
fieldConfigValue.description: Known presentation metadata for one result column. Unknown renderer extensions are retained.

decimals.title: Decimal places
decimals.description: Requested number of decimal places for numeric display.

description.title: Description
description.description: Supporting display text for the field.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Display-only suffix appended to the value.

color.title: Color
color.description: Theme token or CSS color hint interpreted by the renderer.

noValue.title: No-value text
noValue.description: Text shown for NULL or unavailable values.

hidden.title: Hidden
hidden.description: Suppress this otherwise eligible result field.

columns.title: Column overrides
columns.description: Display metadata keyed by exact result-column name.

queryPresentationPatchV1.title: Presentation patch
queryPresentationPatchV1.description: RFC 7396 JSON Merge Patch applied over the saved query's base panel object. Object members merge recursively, arrays replace the previous array completely, and a null member deletes an optional property. A patch may not change panel.cfg.type, and the final resolved panel must validate like a normal saved-query panel.

dashboardSizeHints.title: Size hints
dashboardSizeHints.description: Layout-neutral tile size hints. Authoring may derive an initial placement from them; they never own actual Dashboard placement.

minimum.title: Minimum size
minimum.description: Smallest layout-neutral tile size that still renders usefully.

queryDashboardPresentationV1.title: Dashboard configuration
queryDashboardPresentationV1.description: Reusable Dashboard presentation for this query: role, named presentation variants, and layout-neutral size hints. Actual Dashboard sequence, placement, and tile-local overrides live in the Dashboard document. Feature-specific extensions remain forward compatible.

role.title: Dashboard role (Panel, Filter, or Setup)
role.description: How the saved query participates in a dashboard. panel (the default) creates a visualization tile. filter returns exactly one row whose supported top-level Array, named Tuple Array, or Map columns provide option lists for parameters with the same exact names; it creates no tile and its SQL cannot declare parameters. setup is reserved for serialized Dashboard setup execution.

defaultVariant.title: Default presentation variant
defaultVariant.description: Variant applied when a tile does not select one. Must name an existing entry in variants.

variants.title: Presentation variants
variants.description: Named reusable presentation patches, each an RFC 7396 JSON Merge Patch over the base panel.

panel.title: Panel configuration
panel.description: Visualization and field metadata for the saved query.

key.title: Result schema key
key.description: Saved result-column signature used to detect stale positional roles.

lineChartStyle.title: Line style
lineChartStyle.description: Renderer-independent line presentation. Unknown fields and future string values remain storable.

curve.title: Line curve
curve.description: linear draws straight segments, smooth uses monotone interpolation, and stepped draws step-after segments.

points.title: Point markers
points.description: auto shows markers only for sparse results, show always displays them, and hide retains hover targets without visible markers.

scale.title: Value scale
scale.description: zero anchors the value axis at zero, data uses the data range, and auto uses the chart-type default.

legend.title: Legend visibility
legend.description: auto shows the legend for multiple datasets; show and hide override that behavior.

grid.title: Grid visibility
grid.description: auto shows the value grid in the workbench and hides it on Dashboard; show and hide override the surface default.

axes.title: Axis visibility
axes.description: show renders both axes; hide removes both axes while retaining chart interaction.

areaChartStyle.title: Area style
areaChartStyle.description: Curve, marker, and additive stacking presentation for Area charts.

stack.title: Area stacking
stack.description: overlay draws series independently; stacked uses one shared additive stack without normalization.

barChartStyle.title: Bar and Column style
barChartStyle.description: Grouping and category-spacing presentation shared by horizontal Bar and vertical Column charts.

mode.title: Bar grouping
mode.description: grouped draws measures side by side; stacked adds them on one shared value stack.

density.title: Category spacing
density.description: normal uses standard spacing, compact reduces gaps, and joined removes category gaps.

scale.title: Value scale
scale.description: zero and auto anchor Bar/Column at zero; data uses the data range.

legend.title: Legend visibility
legend.description: auto shows the legend for multiple datasets; show and hide override that behavior.

grid.title: Grid visibility
grid.description: auto shows the value grid in the workbench and hides it on Dashboard; show and hide override the surface default.

axes.title: Axis visibility
axes.description: show renders both axes; hide removes both axes while retaining chart interaction.

shape.title: Pie shape
shape.description: pie fills the center; donut uses a fixed 60% cutout.

legend.title: Legend visibility
legend.description: show renders the slice legend; hide relies on tooltips.

frame.title: Chart frame
frame.description: compact reduces Pie layout padding; normal retains the standard frame.

y.title: Measure columns
y.description: One or more zero-based result-column indexes used as measures.

series.title: Series column
series.description: Optional zero-based result-column index used to split series.

panelCfg.title: Panel type configuration
panelCfg.description: Discriminated visualization configuration. Unknown types remain storable for forward compatibility.

oneOf.title: Column chart
oneOf.description: Vertical columns using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Horizontal bar chart
oneOf.description: Horizontal bars using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Line chart
oneOf.description: Line series using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Area chart
oneOf.description: Filled line series using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Pie chart
oneOf.description: Pie slices using one positional measure role.

oneOf.title: KPI
oneOf.description: One-row scalar and named-tuple KPI cards.

oneOf.title: Table
oneOf.description: Tabular result rendering with no required panel-specific fields.

oneOf.title: Logs
oneOf.description: Timestamped log messages with optional explicit result-column roles.

oneOf.title: Markdown text
oneOf.description: Safe Markdown content that does not require a SQL result.

content.title: Markdown content
content.description: Source text for the safe Markdown renderer.

oneOf.title: Image
oneOf.description: A single ClickHouse `FORMAT PNG` result rendered as an image. The authored SQL must end in an explicit FORMAT PNG clause.

fit.title: Image fit
fit.description: contain scales the image to fit within the tile preserving aspect ratio, cover fills the tile and crops overflow, and actual renders at intrinsic CSS pixel size in a scrollable body.

background.title: Image background
background.description: theme uses the surrounding surface color, transparent shows nothing behind the image, and checkerboard renders a checkerboard pattern (useful for a transparent PNG).

alt.title: Alt text
alt.description: Accessible description for the image. Falls back to the tile/query title when absent.

oneOf.title: Future panel type
oneOf.description: Forward-compatible storage branch for a type implemented by a newer build.

saved-query-v2.title: Altinity SQL Browser saved query v2
saved-query-v2.description: One canonical saved query in an Altinity SQL Browser Library v2 document.

id.title: Saved-query identifier
id.description: Stable application-managed identity within a Library.

sql.title: SQL document
sql.description: SQL editor content associated with the saved query.

specVersion.title: Presentation Spec version
specVersion.description: Version of the schema and semantics used by the saved-query Presentation Spec.

library-v2.title: Altinity SQL Browser Library v2
library-v2.description: A complete portable Altinity SQL Browser saved-query Library.

$schema.title: Schema identifier
$schema.description: Optional schema hint for editors, agents, and third-party tools.

exportedAt.title: Export timestamp
exportedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this portable Library document was created. Optional for compatibility with previously accepted v2 files; all new exports include it.

dashboard-layout-flow-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser Dashboard flow@1 layout
dashboard-layout-flow-v1.description: The normative flow@1 Dashboard layout: deterministic row-major packing driven by dashboard.tiles order, one preset, and per-tile span/height placements keyed by tile ID. This document is also the only valid DashboardLayoutFallbackV1 shape.

type.title: Layout engine
type.description: Layout engine identifier; always flow for this contract.

version.title: Layout engine version
version.description: flow contract version; always 1 for this contract.

items.title: Tile placements
items.description: Per-tile placement keyed by tile ID. A missing placement uses span 1 and medium height.

flowPresetV1.title: Flow preset
flowPresetV1.description: Desktop column arrangement: full-width and report render one column (report centers a constrained-width column), columns-2 and columns-3 render equal columns.

flowHeightV1.title: Tile height
flowHeightV1.description: Normative height ordering is compact < medium < large; exact pixels are renderer-defined.

flowTilePlacementV1.title: Tile placement
flowTilePlacementV1.description: Closed placement contract: unknown fields fail validation. Future extension requires flow@2 or an explicit extension namespace.

span.title: Column span
span.description: Columns the tile occupies; the effective span is clamped to the active column count.

dashboard-layout-grafana-grid-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser Dashboard grafana-grid@1 layout
dashboard-layout-grafana-grid-v1.description: The normative grafana-grid@1 Dashboard layout: rowless deterministic packing driven by dashboard.tiles order into a single 12-column grid, and per-tile span/height placements keyed by tile ID. Unlike flow@1 this engine has no preset. A grafana-grid primary layout always pairs with a valid flow@1 DashboardLayoutFallbackV1 document, regenerated on every mutation.

type.title: Layout engine
type.description: Layout engine identifier; always grafana-grid for this contract.

version.title: Layout engine version
version.description: grafana-grid contract version; always 1 for this contract.

items.title: Tile placements
items.description: Per-tile placement keyed by tile ID. A missing placement uses span 6 and medium height.

grafanaGridHeightV1.title: Tile height
grafanaGridHeightV1.description: Tile height in numeric row units (1..16); px = 32 + 88*units, so units 1/2/3 land close to the legacy compact/medium/large tiers (120/208/296px) and unit 16 reaches 1440px. The legacy compact|medium|large strings are still accepted for backward compatibility and are normalized to their numeric equivalents (1/2/3) by the layout's `normalize` step; new writes should always be numeric.

grafanaGridTilePlacementV1.title: Tile placement
grafanaGridTilePlacementV1.description: Closed placement contract: unknown fields fail validation. Future extension requires grafana-grid@2 or an explicit extension namespace.

span.title: Column span
span.description: Columns (of 12) the tile occupies; the effective span is clamped to the active column count at each responsive breakpoint.

dashboard-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser Dashboard document v1
dashboard-v1.description: One explicit Dashboard aggregate: tile instances, semantic tile order, layout, filter definitions, and persistence revision. Runtime values and result caches are never persisted here. Unknown future documentVersion values fail closed.

documentVersion.title: Dashboard document version
documentVersion.description: Dashboard document contract version; always 1 for this contract.

description.title: Dashboard description
description.description: Optional authoring note shown with the Dashboard.

revision.title: Persistence revision
revision.description: Incremented once for each successfully committed Dashboard document mutation. Validation, preview, and export never increment it. Starts at 1.

filters.title: Filter definitions
filters.description: Dashboard filter definitions in filter order. Required even when empty.

tiles.title: Tiles
tiles.description: Tile instances in canonical semantic order: execution planning, DOM and keyboard traversal, fallback rendering, print/export, and serialization all follow this order. Required even when empty.

dashboardTilePresentationV1.title: Tile presentation selection
dashboardTilePresentationV1.description: Selected reusable variant and optional small tile-local override patch, both resolved over the saved query's base panel.

variant.title: Selected variant
variant.description: Name of a variant declared on the tile's saved query. A persisted name that no longer exists fails validation; there is no silent fallback.

dashboardTileV1.title: Dashboard tile
dashboardTileV1.description: One query instance placed on this Dashboard: stable instance identity, query reference, selected presentation, and optional local title/description. Actual placement and size live in the layout document.

id.title: Tile identifier
id.description: Stable tile instance identity within this Dashboard.

queryId.title: Saved-query reference
queryId.description: ID of the saved query this tile renders. The query must exist and have Dashboard role panel.

dashboardFilterDefinitionV1.title: Dashboard filter definition
dashboardFilterDefinitionV1.description: One Dashboard filter: the targeted parameter name, an optional filter-role source query providing options, and optional explicit target tiles. Runtime filter values are never persisted here.

id.title: Filter identifier
id.description: Stable filter identity within this Dashboard.

parameter.title: Parameter name
parameter.description: ClickHouse query parameter name this filter supplies. Target queries must declare the parameter with compatible types.

sourceQueryId.title: Option source query
sourceQueryId.description: ID of a filter-role saved query whose result provides the option list. The source query never creates a tile.

targets.title: Target tiles
targets.description: Tile IDs this filter applies to. Absent means every compatible panel tile.

defaultValue.title: Default value
defaultValue.description: Optional default parameter value; any JSON value.

dashboardLayoutFallbackV1.title: Layout fallback
dashboardLayoutFallbackV1.description: A complete valid flow@1 layout rendered when the primary layout engine cannot load. Fallback placement keys resolve against the same dashboard.tiles.

dashboardLayoutDocumentV1.title: Dashboard layout document
dashboardLayoutDocumentV1.description: Versioned, engine-specific placement document. An unsupported type/version must carry a valid flow@1 fallback or the Dashboard fails before execution.

config.title: Engine configuration
config.description: Open engine-specific configuration object; recursively key-sorted by the canonical encoder.

items.title: Placement entries
items.description: Engine-specific placement objects keyed by tile ID. Every key must reference an existing tile and the entry count must not exceed the tile count.

stored-workspace-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser stored workspace v1
stored-workspace-v1.description: The atomic browser-persistence aggregate: one workspace with an ordered saved-query collection and zero or one Dashboard. Internal persistence contract; portable interchange uses portable-bundle-v1 instead.

storageVersion.title: Storage version
storageVersion.description: Stored-workspace contract version; always 1 for this contract. Unknown future versions fail closed.

id.title: Workspace identifier
id.description: Stable generated workspace identity. Two files with the same name still produce distinct workspace IDs.

name.title: Workspace name
name.description: User-visible workspace name. Renaming the workspace does not rename its Dashboard.

queries.title: Saved queries
queries.description: The ordered saved-query collection in catalog/authoring order, independent of Dashboard tile order. Required even when empty.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: The zero-or-one editable Dashboard of this workspace; null when none exists.

portable-bundle-v1.title: Altinity SQL Browser portable bundle v1
portable-bundle-v1.description: The one canonical portable interchange format: saved queries plus zero or more Dashboard documents. All newly written importable/exportable JSON uses this format; legacy Library v1/v2 files remain readable through compatibility decoders.

$schema.title: Schema identifier
$schema.description: Optional schema hint for editors, agents, and third-party tools.

version.title: Bundle format version
version.description: Portable bundle contract version; always 1 for this contract. Unknown future versions fail closed.

exportedAt.title: Export timestamp
exportedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this portable bundle was created.

metadata.title: Bundle metadata
metadata.description: Optional human-readable bundle name and description.

queries.title: Saved queries
queries.description: Every query referenced by the bundled dashboards plus any standalone queries; each query appears exactly once. Required even when empty.

dashboards.title: Dashboard documents
dashboards.description: Bundled Dashboard documents. The v1 Workbench manages at most one Dashboard; multi-dashboard bundles are import-resolution input for tooling and forward compatibility. Required even when empty.
